cast.name: 伊雷纽什·乔普 Ireneusz Czop
玛达琳娜·波扎斯卡 Magdalena Boczarska

introduction: The story of a man who set out to commit suicide but failed because he was killed. Or, rather, it was an accident.F.P., a 50-year-old man, arrives at a seaside resort. He intends to take his own life. He has a family, money, and yet has become overwhelmingly weary of life. As he begins writing a farewell letter to his wife, the ghost of his father appears. The father, who took his own life at a similar age, tries to dissuade his son from doing the same.The action takes place in two timelines: before the storm and after the storm. In this humorous and surprising story about love and disappointment, we gradually discover what drives the protagonist to take such a desperate step. Figures from the past evoke memories. At the same time, an ambitious local police officer conducts an investigation. He is convinced that the man was murdered. The story leads to an unexpected conclusion. Despite the tragic ending, the spirit of F.P. decides to remain on Earth and watch over his daughter.
